title: Mr Muscle Bathroom Cleaner, Platinum Antibacterial Bathroom Spray, Mandarin, Pack of 6 (6 x 750ml)
features: Works as a surface cleaner that removes 100 percent of soap scum
Cleaning spray with no harsh smells Leaves surfaces sparkling clean
This Mr Muscle trigger also acts as a bathroom tile cleaner that can disinfect your surfaces by killing 99.9 percent of viruses and bacteria
Stain remover that cleans off surface dirt and restores shine to your bathroom
description: Product Description Mr Muscle Platinum Bathroom is tough on soap scum and gentler on you. Its new powerful formula removes 100 percent of soap scum and kills 99.9 percent of viruses and bacteria with no harsh smells. This multi purpose cleaner for your bathroom easily removes soap scum and grime from many bathroom surfaces, including baths, shower walls, vinyl shower curtains, shower doors, sinks and vanity tops. The antibacterial cleaning spray formula allows you to either clean by spraying, rinsing and wiping, or disinfect by pre-cleaning, spraying and wiping. Equipped with an adjustable nozzle, this soap scum and stain remover is formulated to cut through grime at any angle, horizontal or vertical. The Mr Muscle Platinum Window and Glass bottle body is made of 100 percent Ocean-Bound Plastic. Ocean-Bound Plastic is post-consumer recycled plastic collected within 31 miles of an ocean, or waterway leading to an ocean, in countries with high volumes of uncollected plastic waste in partnership with Plastic Bank. Ingredients Water, Diisopropanolamine, Isotridecyl Alcohol 3EO, Lauramine Oxide, Lauramine Oxide, Benzalkonium Chloride, Tetrasodium Iminodisuccinate, Fragrance Ingredients Water, Diisopropanolamine, Isotridecyl Alcohol 3EO, Lauramine Oxide, Lauramine Oxide, Benzalkonium Chloride, Tetrasodium Iminodisuccinate, Fragrance Manufacturer Contact Information SCJ Ltd.
